tasks.title: Scaffold apps/worker Cloudflare Worker entry point
tasks.description: Create the new apps/worker package directory with package.json, wrangler.jsonc, and src/index.ts. Wire the Hono router, export the Worker fetch handler, and export all DO class names. No agent logic yet — just the skeleton that type-checks.
acceptance: wrangler dev starts without errors
GET / returns 200 from static assets binding
All DO class names are exported from src/index.ts

tasks.title: Add Phase 2 Drizzle schema files and run D1 migration
tasks.description: Create all new schema files under src/db/schema/ (learned_preferences, epics, sprints, tasks, task_assignments, review_sessions, specialist_reports). Extend rules table with approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, scope columns. Generate and apply the D1 migration via drizzle-kit.
acceptance: drizzle-kit generate produces migration SQL
wrangler d1 migrations apply succeeds against local D1
All foreign key references resolve without errors
TypeScript: tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Add shared types packages/shared/src/rules.ts and review.ts
tasks.description: Implement the typed contracts for the rules API (PendingRule, SupportingEvidence, RuleApprovalAction, RulesListResponse) and for the review system (UXReviewResult, PlatformReviewResult, OrchestratorVerdict). Export from packages/shared index.
acceptance: tsc --noEmit passes across all packages
No circular imports

tasks.title: Implement StandardsAgent (Agents SDK)
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/StandardsAgent.ts extending Agent. Implement: onStart() which loads all approved_global rules from D1 and caches them in hot SQLite; processLearningSignal(payload) which embeds rawText using env.AI.run('@cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5'), queries Vectorize for similarity, inserts into learned_preferences, and conditionally triggers LLM rule-extraction when cluster threshold (≥3 similar, score ≥0.88) is met; @callable getPendingRules() returning PendingRule[]; @callable promoteRule(id, action) implementing the approval FSM; getApprovedRulesPromptSnippet() returning a formatted string for system-prompt injection.
acceptance: processLearningSignal() inserts into D1 and Vectorize
Cluster detection correctly identifies threshold
getPendingRules() returns only pending_confirmation rows
promoteRule() transitions FSM correctly for all 4 actions
approved_global rules never returned by getPendingRules()

tasks.title: Connect POST /api/approve and /api/deny to standards-learning-queue
tasks.description: In the existing plan approval route (or the new apps/worker/src/routes/review.ts), after the standard approval/denial logic, iterate over all annotations with non-empty text and enqueue each to the STANDARDS_QUEUE binding. Wire the Queue consumer in src/index.ts to call StandardsAgent.processLearningSignal().
acceptance: Approving a plan with text annotations produces Queue messages
Queue consumer routes messages to StandardsAgent
No duplicate messages for the same annotationId

tasks.title: Implement GET /api/rules and PATCH /api/rules/:id Hono routes
tasks.description: In apps/worker/src/routes/rules.ts, implement GET /api/rules returning RulesListResponse (hardcoded, approved, pending) and PATCH /api/rules/:id accepting RuleApprovalAction. PATCH must proxy through StandardsAgent.promoteRule() via DO RPC, not write D1 directly.
acceptance: GET /api/rules returns all three status groups
PATCH with approve_global transitions rule to approved_global
PATCH with reject sets approvalStatus to rejected
Rejected rule does not reappear in pending list
Project-scoped approval sets scope=project and stores projectId

tasks.title: Create Rules Config Astro page and RulesConfigPanel React island
tasks.description: Add apps/marketing/src/pages/rules.astro which server-fetches initial rules data and hydrates the RulesConfigPanel island. Implement apps/marketing/src/components/RulesConfigPanel.tsx with three sections: (1) Global Hardcoded Standards (read-only), (2) Pending Confirmation cards with approve/reject actions, (3) Active Learned/Custom rules with toggle and inline edit. Use useAgent() from 'agents/react' to receive real-time pending-count updates from StandardsAgent.
acceptance: Page renders without JS errors
Pending card approve action calls PATCH /api/rules/:id
Rejection removes card from pending section immediately
Toggle switch for approved rules calls PATCH /api/rules/:id
useAgent state update increments pending count badge in real-time

tasks.title: Implement CloudflareDocsMcp McpAgent
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/CloudflareDocsMcp.ts extending McpAgent. Register a single tool 'search_cloudflare_documentation' that proxies to the Cloudflare Docs MCP server. This is the shared MCP endpoint that all specialist sub-agents connect to via DO binding.
acceptance: McpAgent initializes without errors
search_cloudflare_documentation tool is registered
Tool returns non-empty results for a test query
Agent survives hibernation and reconnects

tasks.title: Implement UXSpecialistAgent
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/UXSpecialistAgent.ts extending Agent. Implement: onStart() which calls this.addMcpServer('cf-docs', this.env.CF_DOCS_MCP) via DO binding; analyze(plan, streamCollector) which runs the Astro SSR / client:load / Shadcn review pass using env.AI.run with injected system prompt, executes cf-docs MCP lookups as needed, and streams progress via streamCollector.onChunk(); returns UXReviewResult.
acceptance: onStart() registers cf-docs MCP tool without errors
analyze() returns a valid UXReviewResult with score 0-100
astroViolations array is populated when plan contains anti-patterns
streamCollector receives at least one chunk during analysis
addMcpServer uses DO binding, not an HTTP URL

tasks.title: Implement PlatformSpecialistAgent
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/PlatformSpecialistAgent.ts extending Agent. Same structure as UXSpecialistAgent but focused on: native binding usage vs. external REST APIs, wrangler.jsonc migrations presence, AI Gateway fallback config, D1/R2/KV/Queue correct usage patterns. Returns PlatformReviewResult.
acceptance: analyze() returns a valid PlatformReviewResult
bindingViolations populated when plan references fetch() against external APIs instead of bindings
aiGatewayConfigured correctly detected from plan content
MCP tool lookups fire during analysis

tasks.title: Implement OrchestratorAgent
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/OrchestratorAgent.ts extending Agent. Implement: onStart() which loads approved rules from StandardsAgent via @callable getRulesSnippet() and sets the system-prompt state; conductReview(planVersionId) which reads plan content, instantiates both sub-agents via this.subAgent(), runs them in parallel via Promise.all(), collects streamed results, runs an LLM synthesis pass, persists the OrchestratorVerdict to review_sessions and specialist_reports in D1, and broadcasts progress over WebSocket. Expose @callable startReview(planVersionId) for external invocation.
acceptance: conductReview() instantiates UXSpecialistAgent and PlatformSpecialistAgent via this.subAgent()
Both sub-agents run in parallel (Promise.all)
Synthesis narrative is non-empty
OrchestratorVerdict is persisted to D1
WebSocket clients connected to OrchestratorAgent receive progress frames
Sub-agent names are scoped to session: 'ux-{sessionId}', 'pl-{sessionId}'

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/review/start and GET /api/review/:sessionId Hono routes
tasks.description: In apps/worker/src/routes/review.ts, add POST /api/review/start (body: { planVersionId, projectId }) which gets or creates an OrchestratorAgent instance by sessionId, calls startReview(), and returns { sessionId }. Add GET /api/review/:sessionId which returns the current review session status and verdict from D1.
acceptance: POST /api/review/start returns sessionId immediately (non-blocking)
Review runs asynchronously in the DO
GET /api/review/:sessionId returns current status
Once complete, verdict and specialist reports are retrievable

tasks.title: Implement BacklogAgent
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/agents/BacklogAgent.ts extending Agent. Hot SQLite tables: hot_tasks (mirrors tasks D1 columns), hot_task_events (audit log). Implement: onConnect() with snapshot send and presence broadcast; onMessage() with task mutation hot path (Zod validation → SQLite write → this.broadcast() → waitUntil(mirrorToD1())); mirrorToD1() updating tasks and inserting task_assignments in D1; @callable initializeFromPlan(epicIds, taskIds) which bulk-inserts into hot_tasks and broadcasts backlog_initialized; @callable updateTaskStatus(taskId, newStatus, note, agentId); @callable claimTask(taskId, agentId); @callable releaseTask(taskId, agentId); scheduled reconcileWithD1() method for hourly alarm.
acceptance: onConnect() sends snapshot with current hot_tasks
task_update message updates hot SQLite synchronously
this.broadcast() fires before waitUntil(mirrorToD1())
D1 tasks table is updated after mirrorToD1 completes
task_assignments row is inserted on every status change
Agent survives hibernation; connection.state is restored
Second client connecting sees current state in snapshot

tasks.title: Implement backlog decomposition pipeline
tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/lib/backlogDecomposer.ts. Function decomposeIntoBacklog(planVersionId, projectId, env) reads plan content from D1, calls env.AI.run() with a structured-output prompt requesting { epics, tasks } JSON, validates against Zod schema, batch-inserts into D1 backlog tables, then calls BacklogAgent.initializeFromPlan() via DO RPC. Wire this into the POST /api/approve route via ctx.waitUntil().
acceptance: decomposeIntoBacklog() produces at least one Epic and one Task for any non-trivial plan
Zod validation rejects malformed LLM output and retries once
D1 epics and tasks tables are populated after approval
BacklogAgent hot_tasks is populated via initializeFromPlan()
WS clients receive backlog_initialized broadcast
Function is called via ctx.waitUntil so approval response is not blocked

tasks.title: Implement Hono routes for external coding agent REST API
tasks.description: In apps/worker/src/routes/tasks.ts, implement: GET /api/tasks/:projectId (with ?status and ?epicId filters), POST /api/tasks/:projectId/:taskId/claim (body: { agentId }), PATCH /api/tasks/:projectId/:taskId/status (body: { newStatus, note, agentId }), POST /api/tasks/:projectId/:taskId/release (body: { agentId, reason? }). All mutation routes must proxy through BacklogAgent @callable methods via DO RPC (no direct D1 writes). Bearer token authentication via apps/worker/src/lib/auth.ts.
acceptance: GET without auth token returns 401
GET with valid token returns tasks array
Claim sets claimedBy on the task and records task_assignment row
Second claim attempt on already-claimed task returns 409
Status PATCH triggers BacklogAgent hot path (SQLite → broadcast → D1)
Connected WS clients see task_updated broadcast after REST PATCH

tasks.title: Wire BacklogAgent WebSocket route in Hono router
tasks.description: In apps/worker/src/router.ts, add GET /api/backlog/:projectId/ws which handles the WebSocket upgrade and routes to the BacklogAgent DO instance keyed by projectId. Validate the ?token query param before upgrading.
acceptance: WebSocket upgrade succeeds for valid token
WebSocket upgrade returns 401 for invalid/missing token
Client receives snapshot frame immediately after connection
Disconnection triggers presence_left broadcast

tasks.title: Integrate OrchestratorAgent review trigger into plan approval flow
tasks.description: After a plan is approved (POST /api/approve), create or get the OrchestratorAgent for the session and call startReview(planVersionId) via DO RPC using ctx.waitUntil. The review runs asynchronously; the approval response must not wait for it.
acceptance: Approval response returns immediately
OrchestratorAgent is instantiated after approval
review_sessions row is created with status='pending'
Row transitions to 'completed' once sub-agents finish

tasks.title: Add apps/worker to monorepo workspace and CI pipeline
tasks.description: Update the root package.json workspaces array to include apps/worker. Add build and dev scripts (dev:worker, build:worker) to the root package.json. Update .github/workflows (if present) to include the new worker app in CI. Ensure bun install resolves all deps.
acceptance: bun install resolves from repo root
bun run dev:worker starts wrangler dev
bun run build:worker produces a deployable bundle
CI passes

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md with Phase 2 architecture
tasks.description: Add a Phase 2 section to CLAUDE.md describing: new apps/worker app, new Cloudflare primitives (Agents SDK, Vectorize, D1), how to run wrangler dev locally, new environment variables (D1 ID, Vectorize index, Queue names). Update AGENTS.md with the new agent classes and their responsibilities.
acceptance: CLAUDE.md mentions apps/worker and wrangler.jsonc
AGENTS.md lists all 6 agent classes with descriptions

phase3_tasks.title: Implement PatternIngestionMcp McpAgent
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/agents/PatternIngestionMcp.ts extending McpAgent. Register three tools: list_patterns (fetches manifest.json from core-github-standardization via GitHub API using STANDARDIZATION_REPO_TOKEN secret), get_pattern_files (fetches raw file contents for a patternId), and build_inject_command (templates the injectCommand string with project-specific parameters). PatternManifest and PatternEntry types live in packages/shared/src/patterns.ts.
acceptance: list_patterns returns at least one pattern entry
get_pattern_files returns file content map for a valid patternId
build_inject_command interpolates all parameterSchema keys
STANDARDIZATION_REPO_TOKEN is read from env, never hardcoded
Agent is exported from apps/worker/src/index.ts
McpAgent initializes without errors in wrangler dev

phase3_tasks.title: Add template mapping pass to OrchestratorAgent
phase3_tasks.description: Extend OrchestratorAgent.conductReview() with a template mapping pass that runs after the standard specialist analysis. The pass: (1) calls list_patterns via PatternIngestionMcp MCP, (2) makes a ModelProvider.generateStructured() call producing TemplateAnnotation[], (3) calls build_inject_command for each matched annotation, (4) inserts rows into template_annotations D1 table, (5) broadcasts template_annotations event over WebSocket. Add PatternIngestionMcp DO binding to wrangler.jsonc and this.addMcpServer('pattern-ingestion', env.PATTERN_INGESTION_MCP) in onStart().
acceptance: conductReview() calls list_patterns via MCP after specialist passes
TemplateAnnotation[] is Zod-validated
template_annotations rows inserted in D1
broadcast fires with type:'template_annotations'
Zero-match result (empty array) is handled gracefully — review proceeds

phase3_tasks.title: Implement specialist tailoring pass in UXSpecialistAgent and PlatformSpecialistAgent
phase3_tasks.description: Extend UXSpecialistAgent.analyze() and PlatformSpecialistAgent.analyze() to accept an optional templateAnnotations parameter. When provided, for each annotation in the agent's domain, fetch pattern files via MCP and run a ModelProvider.generateStructured() call producing TailoringGroup. Attach the TailoringGroup to the annotation. Return augmented results including tailoringGroups. Update UXReviewResult and PlatformReviewResult in packages/shared/src/review.ts to include an optional tailoringGroups field.
acceptance: analyze() with templateAnnotations produces TailoringGroup[] in result
TailoringGroup.instructions array is non-empty for any matched annotation
TailoringGroup is Zod-validated before being attached
analyze() without templateAnnotations behaves exactly as before (backward compatible)
TailoringGroup is stored in template_annotations.tailoring_group (JSON) via OrchestratorAgent update

phase3_tasks.title: Relocate and reorganize all Drizzle schema files to canonical domain structure
phase3_tasks.description: Move all Phase 2 schema files from src/db/schema/ to apps/worker/src/backend/db/schemas/ following the domain directory layout in §13.1. Create all new directories: configurations/, plans/, annotations/, backlog/, review/, signals/, lifecycle/. Each table gets its own file. Rename existing files to match the canonical table name. Update all imports in agent files. Create new index.ts that re-exports all tables. Create new Phase 3 tables: template_annotations.ts (plans/), sprint_contexts.ts (lifecycle/), agent_rule_snapshots.ts (lifecycle/).
acceptance: tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
No file imports from schemas/index.ts (only index.ts re-exports)
drizzle-kit generate produces migration SQL including new Phase 3 tables
wrangler d1 migrations apply succeeds for all migrations
No circular imports between schema files

phase3_tasks.title: Implement drizzle-zod auto-admin CRUD surface
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/routes/admin.ts. Import all tables from schemas/index.ts. Use a for...of loop over Object.entries(schema) to dynamically register 5 routes per table (GET list, GET by id, POST create, PATCH update, DELETE) using createInsertSchema and createSelectSchema from drizzle-zod. Mount the admin router at /api/admin in apps/worker/src/router.ts behind requireAdminBearer middleware. Add ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN secret to wrangler.jsonc vars.
acceptance: GET /api/admin/tables/tasks returns rows array
POST /api/admin/tables/tasks with valid body returns 201
PATCH /api/admin/tables/tasks/:id with partial body returns updated row
DELETE /api/admin/tables/tasks/:id returns { deleted: true }
GET /api/admin/tables/nonexistent_table returns 404
All routes return 401 without ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN header
Adding a new schema file to schemas/ requires zero changes to admin.ts

phase3_tasks.title: Implement journey-driven API route files
phase3_tasks.description: Create four journey route files in apps/worker/src/backend/routes/: plans-submit.ts (POST /api/plans/submit — insert plan, enqueue backlog decomposition), patterns-inject.ts (POST /api/patterns/inject — record injection command execution), sprints-snapshot.ts (POST /api/sprints/snapshot — insert sprint_contexts row with current rules + completed task IDs), lifecycle-compile.ts (POST /api/lifecycle/compile-rules — call LifecycleArtifactAgent.run() via getAgentByName). Each route must have its own Zod request body schema — do not reuse drizzle-zod generated schemas. Mount all four in router.ts.
acceptance: POST /api/plans/submit returns plan + backlog stub, enqueues decomposition
POST /api/patterns/inject inserts injection record
POST /api/sprints/snapshot inserts sprint_contexts row with correct JSON fields
POST /api/lifecycle/compile-rules returns { jobId } immediately
Each route has its own independent Zod schema (not imported from drizzle-zod)
Journey routes are not served under /api/admin

phase3_tasks.title: Implement ModelProvider central inference control plane
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/ai/providers/model-provider.ts implementing the ModelProvider class exactly as specified in §14.1. Implement generateText() with workers-ai default and external provider routing via AI Gateway, generateStructured<T>() with gemini default and Zod schema retry loop (max 2 retries), and generateVision() with workers-ai default. Add required env bindings to Env type: CF_ACCOUNT_ID, AI_GATEWAY_ID, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY. Add zod-to-json-schema as a dependency.
acceptance: generateText() with no provider calls env.AI.run()
generateText() with provider:'openai' calls AI Gateway URL
generateStructured() returns parsed Zod-validated object
generateStructured() retries on validation failure up to 2 times
generateVision() calls @cf/llava-1.5-7b-hf by default
No other file in the codebase calls env.AI.run() directly (except ModelProvider)
tsc --noEmit passes

phase3_tasks.title: Implement BackgroundOperationAgent base class
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/ai/agents/BackgroundOperationAgent.ts as specified in §14.2. The class extends Agent<E, S extends BackgroundState>. Implement onStart() which instantiates this.ai = new ModelProvider(this.env) and calls onAgentStart(). Implement setRunning(), setComplete(), setError() state helpers. Declare abstract run(payload: unknown): Promise<void>. Include a prominent JSDoc comment mandating getAgentByName() usage over raw DO primitives.
acceptance: Class compiles without errors
Subclass that implements run() can be instantiated
setRunning() updates state.status to 'running'
setComplete() updates state.status to 'complete' and sets completedAt
setError() updates state.status to 'error' and sets error message
this.ai is available in any subclass method

phase3_tasks.title: Implement FrontendInteractiveAgent base class
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/ai/agents/FrontendInteractiveAgent.ts as specified in §14.3. The class extends AIChatAgent<E, S extends InteractiveState>. Implement onStart() with ModelProvider instantiation and onAgentStart() hook. Override onConnect() to parse userId and sessionId from URL query params, call connection.setState(), and invoke onClientConnect(). Include JSDoc mandating getAgentByName() factory.
acceptance: Class compiles without errors extending AIChatAgent
onConnect() correctly parses userId and sessionId from URL
connection.setState() is called in onConnect()
Subclass can override onClientConnect() without touching onConnect()
this.ai (ModelProvider) is available in any subclass method

phase3_tasks.title: Refactor Phase 2 agents to extend base classes and use ModelProvider
phase3_tasks.description: Update all Phase 2 agent files to: (1) extend BackgroundOperationAgent instead of Agent (for StandardsAgent, OrchestratorAgent, UXSpecialistAgent, PlatformSpecialistAgent), (2) extend FrontendInteractiveAgent instead of Agent (for BacklogAgent), (3) replace all direct env.AI.run() calls with this.ai.generateText() or this.ai.generateStructured(), (4) replace all raw DO instantiation patterns (idFromName + .get()) with getAgentByName() calls. Do not change any external behavior — this is a pure refactor.
acceptance: All agents extend the correct base class
Zero direct env.AI.run() calls remain outside ModelProvider
Zero idFromName() or raw .get() calls remain in agent files
All existing Phase 2 acceptance criteria still pass (no regression)
tsc --noEmit passes

phase3_tasks.title: Implement LifecycleArtifactAgent
phase3_tasks.description: Create apps/worker/src/backend/agents/LifecycleArtifactAgent.ts extending BackgroundOperationAgent. Implement run(payload: LifecycleCompilePayload): (1) loadPlanLedger() — query last 10 sprint_contexts from D1 for projectId; (2) loadActiveRules() — fetch approved_global rules from D1; (3) loadTemplateAnnotations() — fetch template_annotations for the review session; (4) generateAgentsMd() — call this.ai.generateText() with the structured prompt from §15.2; (5) generateRuleFiles() — call this.ai.generateStructured() per category producing { fileName, content } objects; (6) persistArtifacts() — write AGENTS.md and rule files to R2 (ARTIFACTS binding); (7) storeRuleSnapshots() — batch insert into agent_rule_snapshots D1 table. Add LIFECYCLE_ARTIFACT_AGENT DO binding and ARTIFACTS R2 binding to wrangler.jsonc.
acceptance: run() completes without error given a valid payload
AGENTS.md content written to R2 under key agents-md/{projectId}/AGENTS.md
Rule files written to R2 under .agent/rules/{fileName}
agent_rule_snapshots rows inserted in D1
run() handles missing previous AGENTS.md gracefully
Agent state transitions: idle → running → complete (or error)

phase3_tasks.title: Wire lifecycle compile route and generate initial .agent/rules/ scaffold
phase3_tasks.description: The POST /api/lifecycle/compile-rules route (created in P3-006) must call LifecycleArtifactAgent via getAgentByName(env.LIFECYCLE_ARTIFACT_AGENT, projectId). After the first successful run, manually download the generated rule files from R2 and commit them to .agent/rules/ in the repository. Create a placeholder .agent/rules/.gitkeep so the directory is tracked. Document the R2 → local sync process in CLAUDE.md.
acceptance: POST /api/lifecycle/compile-rules returns { jobId } immediately
.agent/rules/.gitkeep is committed
CLAUDE.md documents how to sync generated rule files from R2
getAgentByName() is used (not raw DO instantiation)

phase3_tasks.title: Implement anti-vacuum continuity in OrchestratorAgent.onStart()
phase3_tasks.description: Extend OrchestratorAgent.onStart() with the plan ledger query described in §15.4: (1) SELECT last 10 sprint_contexts from D1 for the project, (2) SELECT template_annotations from last 3 review sessions, (3) fetch latest AGENTS.md from R2 (if exists), (4) inject all of this into the agent's system prompt state using setState(). Ensure this executes before any conductReview() call. The system prompt injection must be idempotent — calling onStart() twice must not duplicate context.
acceptance: onStart() queries sprint_contexts with ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
System prompt includes EXISTING SPRINT CONTEXT section when ledger is non-empty
Empty ledger (first sprint) produces no context section — no errors
Calling onStart() twice does not duplicate system prompt context
conductReview() can read injected context from this.state

phase3_tasks.title: Add Phase 3 DO and R2 bindings to wrangler.jsonc and update Env type
phase3_tasks.description: Consolidate all Phase 3 additions to wrangler.jsonc: PATTERN_INGESTION_MCP DO binding, LIFECYCLE_ARTIFACT_AGENT DO binding, ARTIFACTS R2 bucket binding, v3 migration tag with new_sqlite_classes. Update apps/worker/src/index.ts Env interface to include all new bindings (PATTERN_INGESTION_MCP: DurableObjectNamespace, LIFECYCLE_ARTIFACT_AGENT: DurableObjectNamespace, ARTIFACTS: R2Bucket, STANDARDIZATION_REPO_TOKEN: string, OPENAI_API_KEY: string, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: string, GEMINI_API_KEY: string, CF_ACCOUNT_ID: string, AI_GATEWAY_ID: string, ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN: string).
acceptance: wrangler dev starts without binding errors
Env type includes all 10 new fields
tsc --noEmit passes
v3 migration tag lists PatternIngestionMcp and LifecycleArtifactAgent

phase3_tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md with Phase 3 architecture
phase3_tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md with Phase 3 additions: new apps/worker/src/backend/ module tree, ModelProvider usage mandate, base agent class hierarchy, schema canonical layout, admin CRUD surface, R2 artifact sync process, new wrangler.jsonc secrets. Update AGENTS.md with all Phase 3 agent classes (PatternIngestionMcp, LifecycleArtifactAgent) and the two base classes (BackgroundOperationAgent, FrontendInteractiveAgent). Add a getAgentByName() mandate box.
acceptance: CLAUDE.md mentions ModelProvider and prohibits direct env.AI.run() usage
CLAUDE.md documents schema canonical path and admin CRUD surface
AGENTS.md lists all 8 agent classes with correct base class
AGENTS.md has a highlighted box: ALWAYS use getAgentByName() — never idFromName()
